id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

max_retries.description: The maximum number of retries allowed.

state.description: The current status of the task. See https://github.com/hibiken/asynq/wiki/Life-of-a-Task

result_payload.description: The result payload of the task.

last_error.description: The error message from the last failure

last_failed_at.description: Time of the last failure. RFC 3339 format.

next_process_at.description: Time the task will be scheduled to be processed. RFC 3339 format.

retention.description: Duration the task will be retained after succeeding. Golang duration string.

completed_at.description: Time the task successfully finished processing.

timestamp.description: The time the log entry was created. RFC 3339 format.

level.description: The log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL).

issuer.description: The component that issued the log entry (SYSTEM, ARTIFACT).

400.description: The request was malformed or invalid.

401.description: The provided authentication credentials were invalid.

403.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to access the requested resource.

500.description: An internal server error occurred. Look at the server logs for more details.
